title: RPL DODAG and Trickle public helpers dereference NULL state pointers
description: Several public helpers document or imply non-NULL state but do not validate it before dereferencing. Triggers: caller invokes lichen_rpl_dodag_select_parent(NULL), lichen_rpl_dodag_remove_parent(NULL, addr), lichen_rpl_dodag_parent_count(NULL), lichen_trickle_fire_transmit(NULL), lichen_trickle_expire(NULL), lichen_trickle_reset(NULL), or lichen_trickle_next_event(NULL, out). Bad behavior: a caller error crashes the node instead of failing cleanly, unlike neighboring APIs that return or no-op on NULL. Locations: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/dodag.c:205-264, :350-365; lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c:87-123.
